top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client 
WHERE birth_date LIKE '1920-%' 
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client
WHERE strftime('%Y', birth_date) = '1920'
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A2 = 'east Bohemia'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client 
WHERE birth_date LIKE '1920-%' 
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.birth_date LIKE '1920-%' 
  AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';

FROM client
WHERE strftime('%Y', birth_date) = '1920'
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A2 = 'east Bohemia'
  );

  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM client 
WHERE birth_date LIKE '1920-%' 
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
  );
